testcase.name: Login Flow › login page renders correctly
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Login Flow › shows error on invalid credentials
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Login Flow › shows error on wrong password
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Login Flow › successfully logs in with valid credentials
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Login Flow › unauthenticated user is redirected to /login
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Login Flow › register tab switches form correctly
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Login Flow › register with new user then auto-login
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Login Flow › logout navigates back to login page
testcase.system-err: Register returned 409: {"detail":"此使用者名稱已被使用。"}

testcase.name: Project Creation and Selection › project dashboard renders after login
Project Creation and Selection › can create a new project
Project Creation and Selection › can create a project by pressing Enter
Project Creation and Selection › can open an existing project
Project Creation and Selection › can delete a project
Project Creation and Selection › empty state message when no projects exist

property.name: info
property.value: 1 pre-existing projects found; skipping empty state check

testcase.name: Document Upload › upload area is visible in workspace
Document Upload › can upload a markdown file
Document Upload › document count increments after upload
Document Upload › upload shows processing status
Document Upload › document file input accepts markdown files
Chat Q&A with Project › chat input and send button are visible in workspace
Chat Q&A with Project › typing in chat input updates the value
Chat Q&A with Project › sending a message creates a conversation entry
Chat Q&A with Project › sending a message shows streaming response
Chat Q&A with Project › multiple messages create a conversation history
Chat Q&A with Project › new conversation button clears chat area
Conversation History Loading › conversations appear in sidebar after chat message sent
Conversation History Loading › clicking a conversation loads its messages (API-seeded)
Conversation History Loading › switching between conversations shows correct messages (API-seeded)
Conversation History Loading › active conversation is highlighted in sidebar
Conversation History Loading › deleted conversation is removed from sidebar
Project Switching - Conversation Isolation › conversations from project A do not appear in project B
Project Switching - Conversation Isolation › switching back to project A restores its conversations (API-seeded)
Project Switching - Conversation Isolation › document list is isolated per project
Project Switching - Conversation Isolation › chat area is cleared when switching between projects (API-seeded)
